title: Off the grid dragons
description: this adds more dragons beyond the archipelago
body:
IMPORTANT!!! PLEASE READ DESCRIPTION!!! OTG DRAGONS WON'T SPAWN WITHOUT THE CONFIG!!!

IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS OR WOULD LIKE TO REPORT ANY BUGS, PLEASE JOIN

YOU CAN INSTALL THE CONFIG HERE BY JOINING THE Discord server. THEN PROCEED TO "otg downloads"

Additionally, for the new dragons to spawn correctly you'll need to install the modified configs AFTER loading Archipelago Additions for the first time (but BEFORE making your world!)

if there are any bugs to report, please join the AA Discord server. and then proceed to otg discussions



CREDITS/DISCLAIMER

Off the grid dragons is a project made by Gecko_sauce, Mqzikeen, SakuraBabochka, LuckiestLycan and Mako. Our license is and shall remain ARR, to protect these assets of which we have use and distribution permissions but not ownership. Most dragon models use IoB models as a base due to hardcoded rigging dependencies making it impractical to scratch model. Off the grid dragons does not claim to have made these models, they were created by the IoB team and now belong to NBD. We are permitted use of these IoB base assets provided we remain as an addon to IoB and/or NBD and do not claim to have made them. These credits may change as necessary. They will always be correct to the most recent release of this mod. Off the grid dragons is also not affiliated with the official How to Train Your Dragon/ The Croods franchise or Dreamworks animation.
